scripts.text: DROP INDEX IF EXISTS [IDX_EcomInvoiceDetail_CL] ON [Stg].[EcomInvoiceDetail] WITH ( ONLINE = OFF )

CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX [IDX_EcomInvoiceDetail_CL] ON [Stg].[EcomInvoiceDetail]
(
	[InvoiceSK] ASC,
	[ProdDetailId] ASC,
	[ProdLineNumber] ASC,
	[SourceSystemId] ASC
)WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, SORT_IN_TEMPDB = OFF,
IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, DROP_EXISTING = OFF, ONLINE = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, 
ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [parsch_SourceSystemId_new] ([SourceSystemId])

BEGIN
	DECLARE @CutOffDate date = @0; 
	SELECT DISTINCT 
		 [InvoiceSK]
		,[CustomerNumber] =  CAST('001'+CAST(SourceSystemid as varchar(3)) +'-'+ AccountNumber as varchar(50))
		,[InvoiceDate] = CAST([InvoiceDate] AS date)
		,[PurchaseOrderNumber] = REPLACE([PurchaseOrderNumber],'"','')
		,[InvoiceCreatedDate] = CAST([InvoiceCreatedDate] AS date)
		,[InvoicedAmount]
		,[CustomerPayment]
		,[AmountDue]
		,[PDFFileName] = cast('Div_' + DivisionCode + '_Invoice_'+InvoiceSK+
					 (CASE WHEN [InvoiceCreatedDate] > @CutOffDate THEN '' ELSE '_CTCH' END) as varchar(128))
		,[SourceSystemId]
		,[IsProcessed] = 'N'
		,[ETLCreateDate]
		,[ETLExecutionId]
	INTO #EcomInvProcHist
	FROM Stg.EcomInvoiceDetail I
	WHERE AmountDue <> 0
	AND NOT EXISTS (
		SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM [Stg].[EcomInvProcHist] H WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE I.[InvoiceSK] = H.[InvoiceSK]
		AND  I.AmountDue = H.AmountDue
 	)
 
	DELETE H
	FROM [Stg].[EcomInvProcHist] H
	WHERE EXISTS (
		SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM #EcomInvProcHist T
		WHERE T.InvoiceSK = H.InvoiceSK
		)


	UPDATE H
	SET H.[AmountDue] = 0
	,ETLExecutionId = 0-ETLExecutionId
	FROM [Stg].[EcomInvProcHist] H
	WHERE EXISTS (
		SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM  Stg.EcomInvoiceDetail T
		WHERE T.InvoiceSK = H.InvoiceSK
		AND T.AmountDue = 0
		)
	AND  H.[AmountDue] <> 0


	--TRUNCATE TABLE [Stg].[EcomInvProcHist]
	INSERT INTO [Stg].[EcomInvProcHist] (
		 [InvoiceSK]
		,[CustomerNumber]
		,[InvoiceDate]
		,[PurchaseOrderNumber]
		,[InvoiceCreatedDate]
		,[InvoicedAmount]
		,[CustomerPayment]
		,[AmountDue]
		,[PDFFileName]
		,[SourceSystemId]
		,[IsProcessed]
		,[ETLCreateDate]
		,[ETLExecutionId]
	)
	SELECT
		  [InvoiceSK]
		,[CustomerNumber]
		,[InvoiceDate]
		,[PurchaseOrderNumber]
		,[InvoiceCreatedDate]
		,[InvoicedAmount]
		,[CustomerPayment]
		,[AmountDue]
		,[PDFFileName]
		,[SourceSystemId]
		,[IsProcessed]
		,[ETLCreateDate]
		,[ETLExecutionId]
	FROM #EcomInvProcHist;
END

--Ver1.0 Initial

DECLARE @StartDate datetime =  @0
DECLARE @WaitUntil int= @1
DECLARE @Subscription varchar(128) = @2


DECLARE @i INT = 1;
DECLARE @Status NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @Msg NVARCHAR(260);
WAITFOR DELAY '00:01:00';
WHILE (@i <= @WaitUntil*6)
BEGIN
	WAITFOR DELAY '00:00:10';
	SELECT @Status = [LastStatus]
	FROM ReportServer.[dbo].[Subscriptions] S
	INNER JOIN ReportServer.dbo.[Catalog] C WITH (NOLOCK) ON Report_OID = ItemID
	WHERE LastRunTime > @StartDate
	AND S.[Description]=@Subscription
	SET @Status = ISNULL(@Status, 'NoRn')
	IF (LEFT(@Status, 4) != 'Pend')
	BEGIN
		BREAK
	END
	SET @i = @i + 1;
END
IF NOT (LEFT(@Status, 4) = 'Done' AND CHARINDEX('0 errors',@Status) <>0 )
BEGIN
	SET @Msg = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') + '|Error in Report subscription:' + @Status
	RAISERROR (@Msg, 16, 1);
END

QueryReadFromSourceShp.defaultValue:
'--Ver 1.0 Initial
SELECT InvoiceNumber=fi.ds_project
	,ShipmentNumber = fish.di_shipment_id
	,ShipmentDate = dd_shipped
	,Note = (
		SELECT (CASE WHEN ds_note = '' THEN NULL ELSE ds_note END)
		FROM note n WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE n.di_note_id = osh.di_note_id
		)
FROM dbo.fin_invoice_shipment fish WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN dbo.ord_shipment osh WITH (NOLOCK) ON osh.di_shipment_id = fish.di_shipment_id
JOIN fin_invoice fi on fish.di_invoice_id=fi.di_invoice_id'

QueryReadFromSourceInv.defaultValue:
'--Ver 1.0 Initial
 SELECT [InvoiceId] = FI.di_invoice_id
	,ProjectOrSales = OSO.ds_trans_type
	,[DivisionCode] = ds_division
	,[DivisionAddress] = CAST((
			SELECT (ISNULL(ds_address_po, '') + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ISNULL(ds_city_po, '') + ',' + ISNULL(ds_provstate, '') + '-' + ISNULL(ds_postcode_po, '') + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ISNULL('Tel:' + ds_phone_po, '') + isnull(' Fax:' + ds_fax_po, ''))
			FROM division_master dm WITH (NOLOCK)
			WHERE dm.ds_division = oso.ds_division
			) AS VARCHAR(1000))
	,[CustomerAddress] = CAST((
			SELECT (ds_name + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ds_address + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ds_city + ',' + ds_provstate + ' ' + ds_postcode)
			FROM customer_master cm WITH (NOLOCK)
			WHERE ds_code = ds_customer
			) AS VARCHAR(1000))
	,CustomerShiptoAddress = CAST((
			SELECT (ds_name + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ds_address + CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + ds_city + ',' + ds_provstate + ' ' + ds_postcode + isnull(CHAR(13) + CHAR(10) + 'Tel:' + csh.ds_phone, '')) --+ ' Contact:'+ds_contact)
			FROM customer_shipto csh WITH (NOLOCK)
			WHERE csh.di_customer_shipto_id = fi.di_customer_shipto_id
			) AS VARCHAR(1000))
	,AccountNumber = fi.ds_customer
	,QuoteNumber = di_sales_order_id_quote
	,Terms = (
		SELECT ds_name
		FROM dbo.terms t WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE t.di_terms_id = oso.di_terms_id
		)
	,PurchaseOrderNumber =  CAST( REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(oso.ds_customer_po_number,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),''),CHAR(9),'') as varchar(20))
	,CustomerJobNumber = ds_customer_job_number
	,ShippedVia = (
		SELECT Ds_name
		FROM dbo.delivery DL WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE DL.ds_delivery = OSO.ds_delivery
		)
	,SalesPerson = (
		SELECT ds_name
		FROM dbo.[userstats] WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE ds_usercode = ISNULL(ds_outside_sales, ds_inside_sales)
		)
	,Contact = (
		SELECT ISNULL(c.ds_name, u.ds_name)
		FROM dbo.[userstats] u WITH (NOLOCK)
		LEFT JOIN [dbo].[contact] c WITH (NOLOCK)
			ON u.di_contact_id = c.di_contact_id
		WHERE ds_usercode = ds_inside_sales
		)
	,OrderName = (
		SELECT ds_name
		FROM dbo.projectname p WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE p.ds_project = oso.ds_project AND p.ds_trans_type = oso.ds_trans_type
		)
	,InvoiceNote = (
		SELECT (CASE WHEN ds_note = '' THEN NULL ELSE ds_note END)
		FROM note n WITH (NOLOCK)
		WHERE n.di_note_id = fi.di_note_id
		)
	,Invoiced = PRDDTL.di_qty_invoiced
	,Shipped = PRDDTL.di_qty_shipped
	,ProdDesc = PRDDTL.ds_description
	,ProdLineNumber = PRDDTL.di_line_number
	,ProdDetailId = PRDDTL.di_sales_order_dtl_id
	,ChangeOrder = di_Order
	,MiscDescription = ds_misc_desc
	,InvoiceNumber = fi.ds_project
	,ProjectNumber = oso.ds_project
	,InvoiceDate = Convert(VARCHAR(12), dd_invoice, 107)
	,InvoiceDatetime = dd_invoice
	,PreTaxTotal = dn_pretax_total
	,TaxTotal = fi.dn_tax_total
	,IsProd = SUM(ISNULL(Prod, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY fi.di_invoice_id)
	,IsMisc = SUM(ISNULL(Misc, 0)) OVER (PARTITION BY fi.di_invoice_id)
	,[InvoiceCreatedDate] =  FI.dd_created 
 	,[AmountDue] = CAST([dn_pretax_total] + fi.[dn_tax_total] - ISNULL([CustomerPayment], 0) as decimal(14,4))
	,InvoicedAmount = CAST([dn_pretax_total] + fi.[dn_tax_total] as decimal(14,4))
	,[CustomerPayment] =CAST([CustomerPayment] as decimal(14,4))
FROM dbo.fin_invoice FI WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order OSO WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON OSO.di_sales_order_id = FI.di_sales_order_id
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT di_invoice_id
		,ds_description = ds_description COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
		,di_line_number
		,fisod.di_sales_order_dtl_id
		,di_qty_invoiced = SUM(di_qty)
		,di_qty_shipped = SUM(di_qty - di_qty_stored)
		,di_Order = NULL
		,ds_misc_desc = NULL
		,Prod = 1
		,Misc = 0
	FROM fin_invoice_sales_order_dtl fisod WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order_dtl osod WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON osod.di_sales_order_dtl_id = fisod.di_sales_order_dtl_id
	INNER JOIN fin_invoice_sales_order_dtl_opening fisodo WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON fisodo.di_invoice_sales_order_dtl_id = fisod.di_invoice_sales_order_dtl_id
	--WHERE di_invoice_id IN (737244, 775884, 882022, 917474, 922396)
	GROUP BY di_invoice_id
		,ds_description
		,di_line_number
		, fisod.di_sales_order_dtl_id

	UNION ALL
	
	SELECT di_invoice_id
		,ds_description = NULL
		,di_line_number = -1
		,fimc.di_sales_order_miscellaneous_cost_id
		,di_qty_invoiced = NULL
		,di_qty_shipped = NULL
		,di_Order = (CASE WHEN di_order = 0 THEN NULL ELSE di_order END)
		,ds_misc_desc = ds_note COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
		,Prod = 0
		,Misc = 1
	FROM DBO.fin_invoice_miscellaneous_cost FIMC WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN dbo.ord_sales_order_miscellaneous_cost OSOMC WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON OSOMC.di_sales_order_miscellaneous_cost_id = FIMC.di_sales_order_miscellaneous_cost_id
	INNER JOIN dbo.note N
		ON N.di_note_id = OSOMC.di_note_id
			--WHERE di_invoice_id IN (737244, 775884, 882022, 917474, 922396)
	) PRDDTL
	ON FI.di_invoice_id = PRDDTL.di_invoice_id
	LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT di_invoice_id
		,[CustomerPayment] = SUM(ISNULL(dn_deposit_applied + dn_discount + dn_payment + dn_writeoff, 0))
	FROM [dbo].[fin_customer_payment_dtl_invoice] ficpdi WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN [dbo].[fin_customer_payment_dtl] ficpd WITH (NOLOCK) ON ficpd.di_customer_payment_dtl_id = ficpdi.di_customer_payment_dtl_id
	GROUP BY di_invoice_id
	) ficpd ON ficpd.di_invoice_id = fi.di_invoice_id'

QueryReadFromSourceTax.defaultValue:
'--Ver 1.0 Initial

--Ver 1.0 Initial
SELECT InvoiceNumber = fi.ds_project
	,InvoiceId = Fi.di_invoice_id
	,[PreTaxTotal] = [dn_pretax_total]
	,[TaxDesc] = TM.[ds_tax_desc]
	,[Tax] = CAST(cast([dn_amount] * [dn_taxable_amount] AS DECIMAL(7, 2)) AS VARCHAR(10))
	,[InvoiceTotal] = [dn_pretax_total] + fi.[dn_tax_total]
	,[LessPaymentsDeposits] = [CustomerPayment]
	,[AmountDue] = [dn_pretax_total] + fi.[dn_tax_total] - ISNULL([CustomerPayment], 0)
	,MaxLen = MAX(LEN([ds_tax_desc])) OVER (PARTITION BY Fi.di_invoice_id)
	,InvoiceDate = fi.dd_created	,DivisionCode = ds_division
FROM [dbo].[fin_invoice] fi WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN [dbo].[ord_sales_order] OSO WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON OSO.di_sales_order_id = FI.di_sales_order_id
LEFT JOIN [dbo].[fin_invoice_tax] FIT WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON FIT.di_invoice_id = fi.di_invoice_id
LEFT JOIN [dbo].[tax_master] TM WITH (NOLOCK)
	ON TM.ds_tax_code = ISNULL(FIT.ds_tax_code, - 1)
LEFT JOIN (
	SELECT di_invoice_id
		,[CustomerPayment] = SUM(ISNULL(dn_deposit_applied + dn_discount + dn_payment + dn_writeoff, 0))
	FROM [dbo].[fin_customer_payment_dtl_invoice] ficpdi WITH (NOLOCK)
	INNER JOIN [dbo].[fin_customer_payment_dtl] ficpd WITH (NOLOCK)
		ON ficpd.di_customer_payment_dtl_id = ficpdi.di_customer_payment_dtl_id
	GROUP BY di_invoice_id
	) ficpd
	ON ficpd.di_invoice_id = fi.di_invoice_id'
